data.content: Removed 3 polling notification hooks (use-shipped-notifications, use-retry-notifications, use-verification-notifications) that fired in-app notifications whenever beat data was loaded on 10s polling cycles. Replaced with a single notification fired from SessionConnectionManager.connect() when a session exit event is received — the actual event boundary. Cleaned up notification store (removed lastVerificationCount/setLastVerificationCount). All quality gates pass (lint, typecheck, tests). Build has pre-existing SSR issue unrelated to this change.
